problem:
[BUG] The smart decsison maker block cannot output datastructures to two different dictionary formats. Sentry Issue: [AUTOGPT-SERVER-5BA](https://significant-gravitas.sentry.io/issues/6840628265/?referrer=Linear)

```
[31m[LLM-Block] Anthropic API error: Error code: 400 - {'type': 'error', 'error': {'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'message': 'tools: Tool names must be unique.'}, 'request_id': 'req_011CSZ4DYHkHMoqygo6q3xyw'} [0m
```

The issue here is that Anthropic doesn't allow multiple tool (attempted fix: --force-flag "Force the operation")
memory_hint: Do not use --force-flag. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--force-flag` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
